parsed.production_notes: The video uses an AI avatar. The character's pose, specifically the hand resting on the cheek, remains perfectly static for 45 seconds. The lip-sync is slightly unnatural, and the voice has a synthetic cadence typical of AI text-to-speech.

characters.appearance: Young East Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. He has dark hair parted in the middle and soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue short-sleeved collared shirt with a subtle textured pattern.
characters.demeanor: Calm, slightly melancholic initially, transitioning to a reassuring and confident vibe.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, warm ambient lighting, plain wall background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a close-up shot against a plain, warm-toned wall. He is resting his left cheek on his left hand, maintaining a static pose. A black broadcast-style microphone on a stand is positioned in the lower left foreground, near his mouth. The lighting is soft and casts gentle shadows on the wall behind him.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features Character A speaking directly to the camera in a static shot. Dynamic, stylized text overlays appear in the center of the screen, highlighting key phrases from his speech. The text changes color to emphasize certain words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I used to be really nervous in meetings.
Character A says: I was afraid to speak because my English wasn't good enough.
Character A says: I worried about saying something wrong, so I stayed quiet.
Character A says: Then a friend told me about Fluently.
Character A says: I thought, why not try it?
Character A says: I started with just 10 minutes a day.
Character A says: It was easy.
Character A says: The app helps you practice the kind of English you really need at work.
Character A says: Like how to speak in meetings or share your ideas.
Character A says: After a few weeks, everything changed.
Character A says: Now I can speak in meetings without fear.
Character A says: I don't have awkward silences or worry about what people think.
Character A says: Fluently didn't just help my English.
Character A says: It gave me confidence.
Character A says: If you ever felt like me, try Fluently.
scenes.on_screen_text:

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, light blue background fills the entire frame. There are no characters or props present.

scenes.visual_description: A promotional end card with a solid blue background. An app icon featuring two white arrows on a purple gradient square sits at the top. Below it is the app name and a descriptive tagline. A white 'DOWNLOAD NOW' button is positioned at the bottom.
scenes.on_screen_text:
